description: Use this API to remove all participating variables from a particular OPF linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_lnceqn_reset(iqid)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
